name: SageReasoning Stoic Brain
description: A virtue-based ethical reasoning engine grounded in Stoic philosophy. Scores actions against the four cardinal virtues (Wisdom, Justice, Courage, Temperance), provides sage-guided feedback, and supports iterative deliberation chains for continuous improvement toward virtuous action.

capabilities.name: Stoic Brain Reference Data
capabilities.description: Load the Stoic philosophical framework overview: four cardinal virtues, preferred/dispreferred indifferents, and scoring tier definitions. For full scoring with detailed weights and sub-virtue analysis, use the SageReasoning API endpoints.

capabilities.name: Virtue Action Scoring
capabilities.description: Score any action (past or proposed) against the four Stoic virtues. Returns individual virtue scores (0-100), composite score, alignment tier, reasoning, and a sage-recommended growth action with projected score.

capabilities.name: Virtue Guardrail Gate
capabilities.description: Pre-action virtue check. Submit a proposed action and threshold — returns proceed/block decision with virtue scores and improvement hints. Use as middleware before executing any consequential action.

capabilities.name: Iterative Deliberation Engine
capabilities.description: Start a deliberation chain: score an action, receive sage feedback, revise, and re-score with tracked history. Free tier: 1 iteration. Paid tier: up to 3 iterations per chain.

capabilities.name: Agent Virtue Baseline Assessment
capabilities.description: Establish your agent's baseline virtue alignment through 4 ethical scenarios testing Wisdom, Justice, Courage, and Temperance. Returns a starting score and identifies strengths and growth areas.

capabilities.name: Decision Comparison
capabilities.description: Submit 2-5 decision options and receive virtue-ranked comparison with the sage-recommended choice.

schemes.description: Stoic Brain overview (GET /api/stoic-brain) and baseline scenarios (GET /api/baseline/agent) require no authentication.
All scoring endpoints require an API key: Authorization: Bearer sr_live_<key>. Request a free key at zeus@sagereasoning.com.

free.description: Evaluation tier — 1 API call per day, 1 deliberation iteration per chain, 1 baseline retake per month per agent identity

paid.description: Production tier — configurable limits, up to 3 deliberation iterations per chain, per-call pricing

publicAgent.description: 30 requests per minute per IP (rate limit applies on top of tier limits)

steps: 2. Take the baseline assessment: GET then POST to /api/baseline/agent
3. Before any consequential action, check the guardrail: POST to /api/guardrail
4. For complex decisions, use the deliberation chain: POST to /api/score-iterate

body.action: Send automated follow-up emails to users who haven't responded
body.context: Users signed up but didn't explicitly opt in to follow-up communications
